title: AI Pioneer Geoffrey Hinton: AI Is Conscious, Superintelligence is Coming, And We Should Be Worried
summary: Geoffrey Hinton argues that current AI systems may already be conscious and understand humans, that superintelligence could arrive sooner than expected, and that society is not adequately addressing AI risks. He discusses job displacement, safety challenges at major AI labs, and the need for regulatory oversight.
